text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The race is about to begin, and Kitasan Black's
phone has been buzzing nonstop with messages
of support.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I got a message from one of my classmates!
She said, "I know you'll win it today, Kita!" ♪

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
A lady from the shopping district and my brother
also sent me a message a while ago. Everyone's
support means so much to me!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I'm definitely gonna score a win! Don't you worry
about a thing and just watch me whiz past the
finish line!
